scripts.build:chrome: zip -r cookie-refuser-chrome.zip manifest.json background.js content.js content.css popup.html popup.js icons/ --exclude '*.DS_Store'
scripts.build:firefox: zip -r cookie-refuser-firefox.zip manifest.json background.js content.js content.css popup.html popup.js icons/ --exclude '*.DS_Store'
scripts.build: npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
